title: OasisPack
description: Modpack of recommended mods for Oasis SMP
body:
![header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9036f8e5eba21896ca4b79622c58fad0e2ac7435.png)

[![Chat with us!](https://frigs.me/E6fMEm.png "Join our Discord!")](https://discord.gg/oasissmp) [![Visit our website!](https://frigs.me/sZhMhQ.png "See installation guide")](https://oasissmp.com/wiki/oasispack/) # OasisPack This modpack is designed to increase your FPS with multiple performance mods and enhance the way Minecraft looks with quality-of-life mods. A full list of included mods is listed below.

OasisPack is the recommended modpack to use when playing the Oasis SMP Minecraft server, but it can be used by anyone looking for better client performance and visual enhancements! IP address: `play.oasissmp.gg`
Website: https://oasissmp.com/

[![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/discord/1041744235151495168?color=blue&label=Discord&logo=Discord&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/oasissmp) > Note: This modpack was created to increase client FPS and visually enhance the game. This is a client-side only modpack. ## Mods
Performance Mods ▪ Dynamic FPS - Reduce resource usage while Minecraft is in the background, idle, or on battery.
▪ EntityCulling - Using async path-tracing to hide Block-/Entities that are not visible
▪ FerriteCore - Memory usage optimizations
▪ ImmediatelyFast - Speed up immediate mode rendering in Minecraft
▪ More Culling - Changes how multiple types of culling are handled in order to improve performance
▪ Sodium - The fastest and most compatible rendering optimization mod for Minecraft.
▪ Sodium Extras - A Sodium addon that adds features that shouldn't be in Sodium.
Enhancement Mods ▪ Bobby - Allows for render distances greater than the server's view-distance
▪ Continuity - A Minecraft mod that allows for efficient connected textures
▪ Iris - A modern shader pack loader for Minecraft
▪ Jade - Shows information about what you are looking at.
▪ Mod Menu - Adds a mod menu to view the list of mods you have installed.
▪ Mouse Tweaks - Enhances inventory management by adding various functions to the mouse buttons.
▪ No Telemetry - Disable the telemetry introduced in 21w38a
▪ Reese's Sodium Options - Alternative Options Menu for Sodium
▪ Server Pinger Fixer - Improves pinging speed of the multiplayer server list
▪ Shulker Box Tooltip - View the contents of shulker boxes from your inventory
▪ Status Effect Bars - Adds customizable bars to the status effects to show the remaining duration of effects.
▪ ToggleNametags - Hide all player and entity nametags with a single button!
▪ WI Zoom - WI Zoom is a Minecraft mod offering up to 50x zoom with smooth camera movement.
▪ Xearo's Minimap - Displays a map of the nearby world terrain, players, mobs, and entities.
▪ Xaero's World Map - Adds a full screen world map which shows you what you have explored in the world.
